case_title: SAFWAT CHARIF VS. GUSTAVO ABRAHAM CORNEJO-ORELLANA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF SAFWAT CHARIF RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARIF, SAFWAT
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHARIF, SAFWAT AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEJO-ORELLANA, GUSTAVO ABRAHAM PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARIF, SAFWAT AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (MAILED TO: TANNER SANCHEZ - PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE);CERTIFIED MAIL RETURN RECEIPT(GREEN CARD) RECEIVED AFTER 01-14-20 COURT DATE SERVED JAN-07-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED DEC-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEJO-ORELLANA, GUSTAVO ABRAHAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-05-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR AMOUNT OF $7439 OWED TO PLAINTIFF. PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE TO PAY PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1364 TOWARDS THE PLAINTIFF'S LOSS, LEAVING A BALANCE OF $6075. THEREAFTER, DEFENDANT IS TO PAY $200 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON MAR-01-2020 FOR 29 PAYMENTS. THE 30TH AND FINAL PAYMENT ON JUL-01-2022 WILL BE FOR $275. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUG-05-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHARIF, SAFWAT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTIONTO DEC-08-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHARIF, SAFWAT AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEJO-ORELLANA, GUSTAVO ABRAHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-13-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-05-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SFWAT CHARIF IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ABRAHAM CORNEJO-ORELLANA. DEFENDANT APPEARED TO POINT OUT ERRORS IN ORDER NOTICE OF JAN-15-2020 REGARDING THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG FOUND THE CORRECTIONS TO BE SOUND. THE CORRECTED ORDER IS AS FOLLOWS: PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR AMOUNT OF $7439 OWED TO PLAINTIFF. PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE TO PAY PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1364 TOWARDS THE PLAINTIFF'S LOSS, LEAVING A BALANCE OF $6075. THEREAFTER, DEFENDANT IS TO PAY $200 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON MAR-01-2020 FOR 29 PAYMENTS. THE 30TH AND FINAL PAYMENT ON JUL-01-2022 WILL BE FOR $275. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT-5-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TANNER SANCHEZ, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-10-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF SAFWAT CHARIF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS GUSTAVO ABRAHAM CORNEJO-ORELLANA AND PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN OPEN COURT. COURT DETERMINES JUDGMENT AMOUNT OWED TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT CORNEJO-ORELLANA TO BE $7,439.00. PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY IS TO PAY DEFENDANT CORNEJO-ORELLANA THE AMOUNT OF $1,364.00 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ABRAHAM CORNEJO-ORELLANA AGREES TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $200.00 STARTING MARCH 1, 2020, AND THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL THE BALANCE OF $7,439.00 IS PAID IN FULL. (37 MONTHLY PAYMENTS - FINAL PAYMENT OF $239.00 DUE APRIL 1, 2023). PROGRESS REPORT IS SET FOR 7-10-2020 AT 1:30 P.M. AND EVERY 6 MONTHS THERAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE BEING MET, NO APPEARANCE WILL BE REQUIRED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO JULY 10, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE NOT REQUIRED IF TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ARE BEING MET. (SEE SCANNED ORDER)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-01-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (SEE DISPOSITION AND ORDER FILED ON 4-13-21 FOR MORE DETAILS) PLAINTIFF SFWAT CHARIF IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ABRAHAM CORNEJO-ORELLANA APPEARED TO CONFIRM THAT THE ORDER RE: SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WAS CORRECTED AND TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH PROOF THAT PAYMENTS ARE BEING MADE AS AGREED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-01-2022 HEARING IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT MADE AS AGREED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
